zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Clifford於1370年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德布盧時，她的父親Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford37歲，母親Maud de Beauchamp35歲。她和Richard Dalton至少有1個女兒。她去世於1430年7月29日在英國威爾斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Clifford于1370年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德布盧时，她的父亲Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford37岁，母亲Maud de Beauchamp35岁。她和Richard Dalton至少有1个女儿。她去世于1430年7月29日在英国威尔斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Clifford was born in 1370, in Brough, Westmorland, England, her father, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, was 37 and her mother, Maud de Beauchamp, was 35. She had at least 1 daughter with Richard Dalton. She died on 29 July 1430, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Clifford est née en 1370, à Brough, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Maud de Beauchamp, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Richard Dalton. Elle est décédée le 29 juillet 1430, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Clifford 1370 in Brough, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford 37 und ihre Mutter Maud de Beauchamp 35. Sie hatte mit Richard Dalton mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Juli 1430 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Clifford è nata il nel 1370 nel Brough, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Maud de Beauchamp, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Richard Dalton. Morì il 29 luglio 1430, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Cliffordが1370年にイギリスウエストモーランドブロウで生まれた時，父Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Cliffordは37歳，母Maud de Beauchampは35歳であった。彼女はRichard Daltonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1430年7月29日にイギリスウェールズで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Clifford(이)가 1370년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 브루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Beauchamp(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Richard Dalton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 7월 29일 영국 웨일스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Clifford nasceu em 1370, em Brough, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Beauchamp, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Richard Dalton. Ela faleceu em 29 de julho de 1430, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Clifford родилась в 1370 г. в местности броую, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Beauchamp, 35. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Richard Dalton. Она умерла 29 июля 1430 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Clifford nació en 1370, en Brough, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Maud de Beauchamp, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Richard Dalton. Murió el 29 de julio de 1430, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
